destroylist
pulses.description:
A curated snapshot of malicious domains targeting the cryptocurrency ecosystem — mainly wallet drainers and crypto phishing sites.
Collected and verified from open threat-hunting operations between July 1, 2025 and the present date.
All indicators are cleaned from duplicates and provided as-is for analysts, SOC teams, and automated defenses.

Key Details:
Focus: Crypto drainers & phishing domains

Timeframe: July 1, 2025 — August 2025
Verified, deduplicated, and ready for integration
Suitable for research, blocking lists, and enrichment
pulses.adversary: Multiple unidentified threat actors targeting cryptocurrency ecosystem

pulses.name: Crypto Scam and Crypto Phishing URLs
pulses.description: This is a collection of malicious crypto scam URLs. These are a mix of active drainers, crypto phishing, pig butchering,  and crypto stealing websites.

adversary: Multiple unidentified threat actors targeting cryptocurrency ecosystem
